trigger_keywords: evitar defectos microbianos en la bodega

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine residues and dirty equipment can harbour spoilage yeasts and bacteria.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Strict cleaning and sanitation remove microbial reservoirs and reduce transfer between wines and vessels.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The probability of microbial contamination and associated off-aromas or instability is reduced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The probability of microbial contamination and associated off-aromas or instability is reduced.
